subject: Status review: rollout milestone in Sydney | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-6717
body: Please note the rollout stream in Sydney has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-6717. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
